problem id: 0a50c4a8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND NOT SHL(1)

examples:
  10110011 -> 00010000
  00100111 -> 10100000
  01000011 -> 01101000
  00011110 -> 11000011
  11001101 -> 00100001
  00001011 -> 01100001
  11011100 -> 00000011
  00110111 -> 10000000
  00110001 -> 00000100
  10110010 -> 00010010

query: 11101000
predicted answer: 00001101
